query:
SELECT league, COUNT(*) as total
FROM players
GROUP BY league
ORDER BY total ASC
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT league, COUNT(*) as total
FROM players
GROUP BY league
ORDER BY total ASC
LIMIT 20;
